name: WA Kaolin Limited
summary: WA Kaolin Limited engages in the exploration and development of infrared mineral resource of kaolinised granite in Australia. It holds a 100% interest in the Wickepin Kaolin project that comprises four retention licenses and a single mining lease covering an area of approximately 10,000 hectares located in Wickepin, Western Australia. The company was incorporated in 1998 and is based in East Rockingham, Australia.
